items.summary: arXiv:2606.05277v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The formation of gravitationally bound overdensities of dark matter (DM), or \textit{halos}, is a generic prediction of theories with particle DM. We present a measurement of halo properties in 28 quadruple image strong lens systems…
